raw.message: No boundaries, just battles. Unleash Hell wherever your day takes you!

hook.summary: Day 1 vs Day 200 progression hook featuring a female actor.
hook.visual_action: Split screen showing a woman talking on top and early-game combat on the bottom.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Day one in Diablo Immortal. I selected the Demon Hunter, picked up a rusty crossbow

scene_flow: Introduction of Day 1 gameplay with a casual player testimonial and basic combat.
Transition to Day 200 showing the player in full armor cosplay and advanced gear.
High-level gameplay montage showcasing complex skills and group combat dynamics.
Final end card featuring the game logo, character art, and download buttons.
audience_proxy: Mid-core to hardcore gamers who enjoy dark fantasy RPGs and long-term character progression.
